description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish nuget that triggers on push events with any tag. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, set up .NET, and then for each project in the repository (DaemonRunner, App, Daemon, Test), pack the project with a version number based on the Git tag and a -beta suffix, then push the resulting NuGet packages to NuGet.org using the NUGET_API_KEY from secrets.
